scripts.lint:architecture: npm run lint:templ-tags && npm run lint:css-apply && npm run lint:imports
scripts.build: npm run lint:architecture && go tool templ generate ./... && npm run vendor:assets && npm run build:css && npm run build:versioned
scripts.verify: npm run build && npx ui8px@latest lint ./... --ignore .manual .project web/static/css/ui8kit && go test ./...
scripts.serve: npm run build:css && npm run build:versioned && node ./scripts/run-server.mjs
scripts.serve:preset:full: npm run build:css && npm run build:versioned && node ./scripts/run-server.mjs --preset full
scripts.serve:preset:headless: npm run build:css && npm run build:versioned && node ./scripts/run-server.mjs --preset headless
scripts.serve:preset:playground: npm run build:css && npm run build:versioned && node ./scripts/run-server.mjs --preset playground
scripts.serve:preset:offline-json-sql: npm run build:css && npm run build:versioned && node ./scripts/run-server.mjs --preset offline-json-sql
scripts.serve:preset:ssh-fixtures: npm run build:css && npm run build:versioned && node ./scripts/run-server.mjs --preset ssh-fixtures
scripts.serve:mode:full: npm run build:css && npm run build:versioned && node ./scripts/run-server.mjs --runtime full
scripts.serve:mode:admin: npm run build:css && npm run build:versioned && node ./scripts/run-server.mjs --runtime admin
scripts.serve:mode:headless: npm run build:css && npm run build:versioned && node ./scripts/run-server.mjs --runtime headless
scripts.serve:mode:playground: npm run build:css && npm run build:versioned && node ./scripts/run-server.mjs --runtime playground
scripts.serve:mode:conformance: npm run build:css && npm run build:versioned && node ./scripts/run-server.mjs --runtime conformance
scripts.go: npm run build:css && npm run build:versioned && go run ./cmd/server
